title: Project Engineer
description:
About Us:

Kim Hua Construction is a leading construction firm specializing in high-quality hotel, commercial, and residential projects throughout Singapore. Known for our commitment to excellence, innovation, and sustainability, we deliver exceptional projects that meet the unique needs of our clients. We are seeking a Project Engineer to support our construction teams and contribute to the successful execution of key developments.

Job Summary:

As a Project Engineer at Kim Hua Construction, you will be responsible for supporting the Project Manager in coordinating all engineering aspects of construction projects. You will ensure that the project is executed in accordance with plans, specifications, budget, and timeline. The role involves close collaboration with subcontractors, suppliers, and internal teams to maintain quality control, safety standards, and overall project efficiency.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Project Coordination & Support:
    Assist the Project Manager in the daily management of construction projects, ensuring alignment with the approved schedule, budget, and design.
    Coordinate and monitor the work of subcontractors and suppliers to ensure compliance with project specifications and timelines.
    Review and ensure the technical accuracy of project drawings, plans, and construction documents.
  • Quality Assurance & Control:
    Conduct site inspections to monitor quality, adherence to technical specifications, and compliance with safety regulations.
    Resolve technical issues that arise during the construction phase and provide solutions to prevent project delays.
    Implement and enforce quality control procedures and safety standards on-site to maintain the highest standards of work.
  • Procurement & Material Management:
    Assist in the procurement of materials, tools, and equipment required for the project, ensuring timely delivery and cost-efficiency.
    Track inventory levels and assist in managing material stocks to avoid delays or shortages during the construction process.
  • Documentation & Reporting:
    Prepare and maintain accurate project records, including progress reports, site diaries, and other necessary documentation.
    Track and report any changes to the scope of work and help ensure that changes are properly documented and communicated to all relevant parties.
    Assist in preparing and submitting reports to the Project Manager, clients, and stakeholders, highlighting progress, challenges, and upcoming milestones.
  • Problem-Solving & Technical Support:
    Provide technical support and guidance to construction teams, addressing any engineering or design-related issues on-site.
    Collaborate with architects, engineers, and designers to implement changes or adjustments to plans as required during construction.
    Coordinate the resolution of any technical challenges with relevant parties to minimize project disruptions.
  • Health, Safety, and Environmental Compliance:
    Ensure that all site activities comply with health, safety, and environmental regulations.
    Support the implementation of safety protocols and conduct regular safety audits on-site.
    Promote a safety-first culture and provide training or support to staff as needed to ensure safe working conditions.

Qualifications:

  • Education: Bachelor’s degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field.
  • Experience: Minimum of 2-4 years of experience as a Project Engineer or in a similar role within the construction industry, preferably with experience in hotel, commercial, or residential projects.
  • Skills:
    Strong knowledge of construction processes, materials, and techniques.
    Proficiency in project management software (e.g., MS Project, AutoCAD).
    Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
    Ability to read and interpret construction drawings, specifications, and technical documents.
    Strong verbal and written communication skills.
    Ability to work well under pressure and meet deadlines.
  • Certifications: Any additional certifications related to construction management or engineering would be an advantage.

Why Join Us?

  • Competitive salary and benefits package.
  • Opportunity to work on prestigious hotel, commercial, and residential projects across Singapore.
  • A supportive, team-oriented work environment.
  • Career advancement opportunities and professional development.
  • Exposure to a diverse range of projects, offering hands-on experience in all aspects of construction engineering.
